transcript.text:
[Food that everybody craves on a cold day]
This is all for me
Soup!
This is all mine
[Not enough...]
[Let's order more]
That was everything we had
Did I eat everything?
[Sale revenue through the roof]
[Negative Celsius]
It's cold
Hello everyone
I couldn't possibly do the intro outside because of the weather
So I'm inside
Fishcake soup... Looks great
It's gotten so cold lately

And I was craving fishcake soup
How many is this?
They have this fishcake pot on the table
I requested to be here today
This whole thing is for me
Thank you
What's the record for eating the most here?
2 grown men had 50 skewers total
I'll try to beat that today
Bon appetit
I've been thinking about fishcake every day since it got cold
It's not as good soggy
So let's take some out
Move them up here
Broth
I must have a taste

[Customers recognized Tzuyang]
Nice and warm
It's great
This is all mine~!
Let's start off with the standard swirly one
With some soy sauce
Winter=Fishcake
I can eat some swirly ones in 1 bite But these are pretty big
So happy that these are all for me
I've always passed by these wishing that it was all for me
My body is warming up now
Which one to eat next?
What's this?
This one has imitation crab meat
I love the texture
What's this?

Red means spicy, no?
There are so many different types
I think this is the chili pepper fishcake
Some soju with these would be perfect
Yellow
It tastes like cheese
I can taste cheese
That's savory
Next
What's this triangular one?
What flavor?
Triangular fishcake This is also chili pepper
That's huge
Dip in soy sauce
I can feel the chili pepper bits
The fishcake is chewy too

Which one did I skip? Green?
What's green? It's round
That's cute
Hot
This is good too
They have 4 of these tables
First come first serve basis
They have so many other foods on the menu other than fishcake
The wall is completely filled
What's this? So cute!
I almost dropped it
Dip it
Webfoot octopus and veggies
I can see the bits inside
I haven't had this one yet
What's this?

This is red and black Glass noodles
I can see the glass noodles inside
Delicious
Yum
This one has burdock
which I don't really like
It doesn't taste too much like burdock
I can also see the bits
Rice cake I haven't had that one yet
It's labeled in white
I found it There's 1
I love rice cake
It's a very chewy, gelatinous rice cake
So tasty
[Stacking the sticks]
I've only had 14 so far

Let's speed it up
I see a lot of the glass noodle one
I must balance the pot out
The soup is where it's at
What if I ask the leftover soup for to-go later?
Fishcake bar was meant for people to gather around and share
But now they came up with this idea to separate it amongst groups because of covid
And I think it's a great idea
Next
Should I order something else?
So many to choose from
That
I've been wanting to eat grilled smelt
It's a grilled fish filled with roe
Let's take 1
Excuse me

Can I order 1 grilled smelt?
Let's take these out
These swirly ones are not as good soggy
It's like eating that thing with cheese bits inside
Cheese hot bar
Still a long way to go
Their record is 50 Between 2 people
Still...
I can't lose to 2 people
I'm craving something cold now
Thank you
Just like how she is in videos
[Terrified]
[Grilled Smelt]
-Here you go -Thank you
-Enjoy -Thank you

Flower!
I love these
Let's grab 1 in the middle
Here's how you eat it Eat the head first
Next, Just eat
It's filled with roe
So nutty and delicious
No need for mayo
I love the cheese the most
I'll order more of that
Cheese, glass noodles, and rice cake, please
We gave everything we had in the inventory
Really? Did I eat everything?
That's 3 tables' worth
I came a bit late today
They close at 9 because of covid restrictions

So they don't prepare as much
I'll have to end with these, but I'm going to order other items
1 pupa soup,
Another order of grilled smelt,
Stir-fried seafood udon,
-Okonomiyaki is more popular -Really?
Then I'll take that instead
This is how it looks inside
Look how big the roes are
I think I've said this before Is this a dejavu?
Why are all eggs/roes so tasty?
[Footage from 2021.12.26] Why are all eggs/roes so delicious?
[While she finishes up the fishcake soup]
These orders are also for Tzuyang?
It's busier than a big group
[Okonomiyaki]

[Pupa soup]
I thought these were alive when I was younger
It's so cool how they don't move to 1 side
They move left and right
It's like a pancake
It's like seafood pancake with mussel, squid, and other seafood
With spicy teriyaki sauce
And fish flakes
It's really moist
Last order
Thank you
Thank you
I wish this was alcohol
It has so many ingredients So good
[PD: Give me some too]
Okonomiyaki

Looks tasty
Since we don't have much time till closing
Does that mean you won't give me some if we had time?!
I'm overly generous today
-It's delicious -Right?
Yummy
Let's finish these up
So good
The pupa soup is really spicy
Last 2 pieces left
[Last one]
She finished it all
I really thought you wouldn't be able to do it
That was great My body feels warm now
Thanks everyone [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
